logical.note: Use symbolic operators only. Word-based operators (AND, OR, NOT) are NOT supported.

attribute_references.note: Attribute names must be referenced correctly based on their naming convention.

simple_identifiers.description: Attributes without spaces or special characters should be referenced directly as identifiers.
simple_identifiers.rule: DO NOT use brackets for simple attribute names

names_with_spaces.description: Attributes with spaces or special characters must use GETVALUE function.
names_with_spaces.rule: ALWAYS use GETVALUE() with quoted string for attributes containing spaces

custom_metric_references.note: User-defined custom metrics must be referenced as function calls. Writing the bare identifier resolves to an attribute lookup, not the metric.
custom_metric_references.rule: ALWAYS append () when invoking a custom metric inside another formula. Custom metrics that take no arguments still require the empty parentheses.
